ShortDescription.Value: Cooperative multiplayer — build one shared city with a friend

Publish.LongDescription: Play Cities: Skylines II together. CS2 Multiplayer Mod lets you and your friends build one shared city at the same time. The mod is experimental — back up your saves and expect rough edges while it grows. Host-authoritative and friend-focused: set a password, share your IP-address, and build together. Not affiliated with Colossal Order, Paradox Interactive or Iceflake Studio.
Publish.ChangeLog: - Join now loads the host world reliably. - Sessions no longer drop during heavy building/zoning. - Pause and simulation speed sync; service budgets sync. - Development-tree purchases sync (unlocks and points); no more infinite points. - More reliable bulldozing and zoning; player markers now show camera height.
